statement.en: RNA-seq profiling of human embryoic stem cell–derived ventral midbrain dopaminergic lineage cells across four differentiation stages

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a biological dataset/resource paper (RNA-seq profiling) dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely preprint or in-press). The claims are empirical and dataset-based rather than theoretical. Classification requires validation by independent replication and peer review. The developmental biology and transcriptomics findings are provisional until formally published and confirmed.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 分化の時間軸が、ドーパミン神経への運命を指数関数的に解き放つ。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 幹細胞から始まる粒子の軌跡が、段階ごとにドーパミン神経へと集約され、明るく成熟する。
